basic_details.job_title: RCIL Cyber Security Expert Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: RailTel Corporation of India (RCIL) Cyber Security Expert Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. RCIL/WR/P&A/26-27/01 on the official website of RailTel Corporation of India. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RCIL Cyber Security Expert Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age Relaxation: OBCs (non-creamy layer) - 3 years, SC/STs - 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/MCA with minimum 7 Years of relevant experience, CISSP/CISA or Equivalent
qualification.details: Cyber Security Expert: B.E./B.Tech/MCA with a minimum of 7 Years of relevant experience. Must possess CISSP/CISA or equivalent certification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RCIL Cyber Security Expert recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Cyber Security Expert position at RailTel Corporation of India is scheduled for 17th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Cyber Security Expert post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech/MCA degree with a minimum of 7 years of relevant experience. Additionally, a CISSP/CISA or equivalent certification is mandatory for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Cyber Security Expert position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Cyber Security Expert post is 50 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC (non-creamy layer) candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Cyber Security Expert role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Cyber Security Expert position will receive a salary in the E-4 grade, ranging from ₹70,000 to ₹2,00,000 per annum, with a 3% increment annually.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Cyber Security Expert role involves an interview, which can be conducted both offline and online. Following the interview, a medical examination will be conducted.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, at the address mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for the exact venue details.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. Candidates will be hired on a contract basis for the Cyber Security Expert role.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Cyber Security Expert by RailTel Corporation of India is RCIL/WR/P&A/26-27/01.
